tasks.description: Extend ChainConfig type to support string IDs (required for Solana)
tasks.context:
FILE: backend/src/types/index.ts

The ChainConfig interface currently has `id: number` (line 11). Solana does not use a numeric chain ID — it uses a string key ('solana'). Update the field to support both.

Find this line:
  id: number;

Replace with:
  id: number | string;

That is the ONLY change. Do not modify any other field in ChainConfig or any other interface in this file. Confirm the file compiles with no type errors after the change (id is used in SettlementMatch.chain — it accepts number already, string union is backward-compatible).

tasks.description: Add Solana chain entry to backend/src/config/chains.ts
tasks.context:
FILE: backend/src/config/chains.ts

The SUPPORTED_CHAINS Map currently has 'base' (chainId 8453) and 'polygon' (chainId 137). Add a 'solana' entry.

BEFORE writing: read backend/src/config/chains.ts to see the exact Map structure and ChainConfig fields used.

Add this entry to the SUPPORTED_CHAINS Map (after the Polygon entry):

  [
    'solana',
    {
      id: 'solana',
      name: 'Solana',
      rpcUrl: process.env.SOLANA_RPC_URL || 'https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com',
      usdcAddress: 'EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v',
      explorerUrl: 'https://solscan.io',
      isTestnet: false,
    },
  ],

If ChainConfig has other required fields (like `nativeCurrency`, `blockTime`, etc.), read the interface definition first and fill them appropriately for Solana (native currency: SOL, blockTime: 400ms). Do NOT remove or modify any existing chain entries.

FILE: backend/src/services/settlement/settlement-router.ts

BEFORE writing: read this file fully to understand the current routing logic (it routes EVM chain IDs to EvmSettlementDetector).

SolanaSettlementDetector already exists at backend/src/services/settlement/solana-detector.ts and exports `class SolanaSettlementDetector` with constructor `(chain: Pick<ChainConfig, 'rpcUrl' | 'id'>)` and method `verifyTransfer(txSig, expectedRecipient, expectedAmountUsdc): Promise<boolean>`.

Add a Solana routing branch:
- Import SolanaSettlementDetector from './solana-detector'
- In the routing logic, check if chainId === 'solana' (or if the chain config has id === 'solana')
- When chain is Solana, instantiate SolanaSettlementDetector with the Solana chain config
- Call detector.verifyTransfer(txHash, recipientAddress, amount) for verification
- Call detector.getRecentUsdcTransfers(walletAddress, limit) for polling

The interface should mirror the existing EVM detector interface. Keep the existing EVM logic intact — only ADD the Solana branch.
